name: ASML Holding / 阿斯麦
summary: ASML 是先进光刻设备的关键供应商，虽通常不直接向 NVIDIA 销售芯片，但其 EUV/DUV 设备是台积电、三星等制造 NVIDIA AI 芯片所需先进制程的基础。 / ASML is a critical lithography supplier. It usually does not sell chips to NVIDIA directly, but its EUV/DUV systems enable the advanced nodes used by foundries that manufacture NVIDIA AI chips.
summaryZh: ASML 是先进光刻设备的关键供应商，虽通常不直接向 NVIDIA 销售芯片，但其 EUV/DUV 设备是台积电、三星等制造 NVIDIA AI 芯片所需先进制程的基础。
summaryEn: ASML is a critical lithography supplier. It usually does not sell chips to NVIDIA directly, but its EUV/DUV systems enable the advanced nodes used by foundries that manufacture NVIDIA AI chips.

business.description: ASML 设计和销售光刻系统、计量与计算光刻解决方案，是先进逻辑和存储芯片制造的关键设备公司。 / ASML designs and sells lithography systems, metrology, and computational lithography solutions that are critical to advanced logic and memory manufacturing.
business.descriptionZh: ASML 设计和销售光刻系统、计量与计算光刻解决方案，是先进逻辑和存储芯片制造的关键设备公司。
business.descriptionEn: ASML designs and sells lithography systems, metrology, and computational lithography solutions that are critical to advanced logic and memory manufacturing.
revenueModel: 服务和升级 / service and upgrades

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteZh: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteEn: The batch draft uses only verifiable total revenue; segment revenue split requires later manual annual-report table review.

business.thesis: ASML 与 NVIDIA 的联系是间接上游：AI 加速器需求推动先进制程扩产，而先进制程高度依赖 EUV/DUV 光刻设备。 / ASML's NVIDIA linkage is indirect upstream exposure: AI accelerator demand drives leading-node expansion, and leading nodes depend heavily on EUV/DUV lithography tools.
business.thesisZh: ASML 与 NVIDIA 的联系是间接上游：AI 加速器需求推动先进制程扩产，而先进制程高度依赖 EUV/DUV 光刻设备。
business.thesisEn: ASML's NVIDIA linkage is indirect upstream exposure: AI accelerator demand drives leading-node expansion, and leading nodes depend heavily on EUV/DUV lithography tools.
riskNotes: 出口管制和客户资本开支波动会影响设备订单节奏。 / Export controls and customer capex cycles can affect tool orders.
供应链依赖精密光学、激光、机电和特种材料。 / Supply depends on precision optics, lasers, mechatronics, and specialty materials.

supplyChain.thesis: ASML 与 NVIDIA 的联系是间接上游：AI 加速器需求推动先进制程扩产，而先进制程高度依赖 EUV/DUV 光刻设备。 / ASML's NVIDIA linkage is indirect upstream exposure: AI accelerator demand drives leading-node expansion, and leading nodes depend heavily on EUV/DUV lithography tools.
supplyChain.thesisZh: ASML 与 NVIDIA 的联系是间接上游：AI 加速器需求推动先进制程扩产，而先进制程高度依赖 EUV/DUV 光刻设备。
supplyChain.thesisEn: ASML's NVIDIA linkage is indirect upstream exposure: AI accelerator demand drives leading-node expansion, and leading nodes depend heavily on EUV/DUV lithography tools.

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.title: NVIDIA-related demand path

entities.name: TSMC / 台积电
entities.relationship: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipZh: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipEn: Advanced foundry customer; its leading-node expansion is an important source of equipment demand.
entities.customerRole: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方
entities.customerRoleZh: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand transmits indirectly through foundry, memory, or packaging investment and is not the same as a direct purchasing relationship.

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipZh: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipEn: Not typically a direct customer; NVIDIA AI-chip demand indirectly drives equipment demand through foundries, memory makers, and advanced-packaging investment.

themeExposure.rationale: 光刻设备不直接供应 NVIDIA，但它决定先进制程扩产节奏，是 AI 芯片制造链的高稀缺设备环节。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 光刻设备不直接供应 NVIDIA，但它决定先进制程扩产节奏，是 AI 芯片制造链的高稀缺设备环节。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Lithography tools do not supply NVIDIA directly, but they determine leading-node expansion cadence and are a scarce equipment layer in AI chip manufacturing.
